content_items.title: Delina Review — Parfums de Marly
content_items.text_content: Delina by Parfums de Marly is stunning. Rose and vanilla notes are incredible.

content_items.title: Baccarat Rouge 540 vs Delina
content_items.text_content: Comparing Baccarat Rouge 540 and Delina. Both have amber. Baccarat Rouge 540 is more synthetic.
Obsessed with Delina by Parfums de Marly! Rose and musk is perfect.

content_items.title: Delina — worth the hype?
content_items.text_content: Delina worth the hype? The rose and vanilla combination is stunning. Comparing to Baccarat Rouge 540.
